_note: Issue #660: legacy banner-form COSMIC TOP SECRET ATOMAL canonicalizes to bare CTS class + ATOMAL companion (AEA axis) per CAPCO-2016 §G.1 Table 4 p36 (banner-title column registration) + §G.2 p40 (Table 5 ARH) + §H.7 p122 (worked example SECRET//RD/ATOMAL//FGI NATO//NOFORN). E066 emits Recanonicalize → `//COSMIC TOP SECRET//ATOMAL`. Co-fires E015 §H.7 p122 (non-US classification requires dissem control). The leading `//` is required to anchor the banner-form parse — `COSMIC TOP SECRET ATOMAL` without the prefix routes through the decoder (R001) rather than the strict legacy-NATO branch.
